title: With united efforts, Tianhui Group joins hands with Qinhuangdao Jiangxi Chamber of Commerce to write a glorious chapter of "anti-epidemic"
contentHtml: On February 20, Zeng Shengwen, president of the Jiangxi Chamber of Commerce in Qinhuangdao, led members of the chamber of commerce to visit the Shanhaiguan Public Security Bureau traffic police on the front lines of the fight against the epidemic. In the face of the sudden COVID-19 epidemic, a smokeless public battle to prevent and control the epidemic has quietly begun. The epidemic is an order, and prevention and control is a responsibility. Qinhuangdao Jiangxi Chamber of Commerce fully implements the spirit of the important instructions of the Party Central Committee and the State Council, and resolutely implements the decisions and arrangements of the Provincial Party Committee, Provincial Party Committee, Municipal Party Committee and Municipal Government on epidemic prevention and control. Under the unified deployment of the Municipal Federation of Industry and Commerce and the Municipal Federation of Industry and Commerce Non-Public Business (Association) Party Committee, the majority of members actively participate in epidemic prevention and control work, and donate money and materials to organizations at all levels to win the battle against epidemic prevention and control. As of February 20, a total of 258,200 yuan in money and materials had been donated. As the president unit of Qinhuangdao Jiangxi Chamber of Commerce, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastics Co., Ltd., under the leadership of Chairman Zeng Shengwen, has donated 60,000 yuan in special membership fees to the Municipal Commerce and Trade Branch of the Qinhuangdao Democratic National Construction Committee and 100,000 yuan to the Municipal Health Commission. , donated 2,000 yuan to the Municipal Cross Society in his own name, and helped units in need of protective equipment purchase 30,000 masks. Among the donations organized by the Chamber of Commerce, he donated 10,000 yuan, 30 sets of protective clothing and 30 pairs of goggles worth 8,000 yuan.
titleZh: 众志成城，天晖集团携手秦皇岛江西商会谱写“抗疫”华章
contentHtmlZh: 2月20日，秦皇岛市江西商会会长曾胜文带领商会会员慰问抗疫一线山海关公安分局执勤交警。面对突如其来的新冠肺炎疫情，一场没有硝烟的公共疫情防控阻击战悄然打响。疫情就是命令，防控就是责任。秦皇岛市江西商会全面贯彻党中央国务院重要指示批示精神，坚决落实省委省政府和市委市政府关于疫情防控的各项决策部署，在市工商联和市工商联非公商（协）会党委的统一部署下，广大会员积极参与疫情防控工作，为打赢疫情防控阻击战，向各级组织捐款捐物。截止到2月20日止，共计捐赠款物258200元。作为秦皇岛市江西商会会长单位——秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司，在董事长曾胜文的领导下，先后向秦皇岛民建市委市直商贸支部捐赠特殊会费6万元，向市卫健委捐款10万元，以个人名义向市十字会捐款2000元，并帮助有需求防护用品单位购买口罩30000支，在商会组织的捐款中捐款1万元，价值8000元的防护服30套、护目镜30副。
